author: newmanifold000
content: Oh, https://github.com/ethereum/hive/blob/master/clients/nethermind/test.json seems to be unused by hive, i had to modify [mkconfig.jq](https://github.com/ethereum/hive/blob/master/clients/nethermind/mkconfig.jq) to enable Testing module previously.

author: newmanifold000
content:
Yeah, the forkenv.json way should work, but I'm thinking maybe the spec should mention that 60M is the targeted gas limit, or 
perhaps we should the gas limit target as requested in another [comment here](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/710#discussion_r2944088614) in the test_buildBlockV1 RPC request?. Otherwise, every other client needs to change the hive configurations.
